name: pi-keel
description: Engineering skills and security system for pi — the keel that keeps AI coding steady

scripts.test: npx tsx scripts/validate-skills.ts && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run test:profile && npm run test:path && npm run test:gate && npm run test:shell-parse && npm run test:cmd-semantics && npm run test:index && npm run test:footer
scripts.test:profile: npx tsx tests/access-gate/profile.test.ts && npx tsx tests/access-gate/profile-load.test.ts && npx tsx tests/access-gate/profile-chain.test.ts
scripts.test:gate: npx tsx tests/access-gate/decision-builder.test.ts && npx tsx tests/access-gate/gate-decision.test.ts && npx tsx tests/access-gate/gate.test.ts && npx tsx tests/access-gate/access-request.test.ts && npx tsx tests/access-gate/task2-contract.test.ts && npx tsx tests/access-gate/gate-policy-matrix.test.ts && npx tsx tests/access-gate/guidance.test.ts && npx tsx tests/access-gate/access-request-invariants.test.ts
scripts.test:cmd-semantics: npx tsx tests/access-gate/command-semantics-control-flow.test.ts && npx tsx tests/access-gate/command-semantics-adapters.test.ts && npx tsx tests/access-gate/command-overrides.test.ts
